name: sdd-workflow
description: Project-local SDD workflow plugin for spec drafting, phase initialization, gate checks, context updates, and spec synchronization.

interface.shortDescription: Phase workflow, gates, and contract sync for this repo
interface.longDescription: Workspace-local Codex plugin that exposes the project's SDD workflow as native Codex skills and slash commands, while also declaring project-local Context7 MCP expectations.
defaultPrompt: Draft SPEC.md from a high-level project brief
Initialize the next project phase from SPEC.md
Run the phase gate checks for the current phase
Sync CONTEXT.md and STATE.md after a phase completes
